title: T-034 — Scanner consume-to-WO endpoint (WH §10.5, §13.5)
prompt:
# T-034 — Scanner consume-to-WO endpoint (WH §10.5, §13.5)

PRD: docs/prd/05-WAREHOUSE-PRD.md §10.5, §13.5
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Implement `POST /api/warehouse/scanner/consume-to-wo`: validates LP & WO eligibility, performs FEFO check (records override if deviation), executes stock_move(consume_to_wo), updates LP qty / lp_genealogy, increments wo_material.consumed_qty, emits lp.consumed + wo.material_consumed.

## Implementation contract
1. `apps/web/app/api/warehouse/scanner/consume-to-wo/route.ts` + service `apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/scanner-consume.ts`: `consumeToWo({wo_id, lp_id, qty_consumed, catch_weight_kg?, operator_id, session_id})`.
2. Validation: LP.status='available', LP.qa_status IN ('PASSED','RELEASED','COND_APPROVED'), WO.status IN ('RELEASED','IN_PROGRESS'), LP.product_id matches any wo_materials.product_id.
3. FEFO check: call `findPickSuggestions`, compare picked vs suggested; if mismatch call `recordPickOverride` and return `override_warning=true` requiring reason on next call.
4. Execute: stock_moves(consume_to_wo), partial→split cascade if `qty_consumed < lp.quantity`, lp_genealogy(operation='consume', wo_id), increment wo_material.consumed_qty, set lp.consumed_by_wo_id + consumed_at.
5. Emit `lp.consumed` + `wo.material_consumed`.
6. SLO <500 ms P95.

## Files
- apps/web/app/api/warehouse/scanner/consume-to-wo/route.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/api/warehouse/scanner/consume-to-wo/__tests__/route.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given a valid intermediate LP consumed fully to WO, when called, then LP.status='consumed', wo_material.consumed_qty incremented, 2 outbox events emitted, and stock_moves row exists with move_type='consume_to_wo'.
2. Given partial consume (qty_consumed < lp.quantity), when called, then LP is split (T-026 cascade) and only the consumed child becomes 'consumed'.
3. Given FEFO deviation, when called without reason_code, then response `{override_warning: true, suggested_lp_id, reason_required: true}` is returned and no consume happens.
4. Given LP.qa_status='HOLD', when called, then service rejects with V-WH-INT-003.

## Test strategy
- RED: `apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/__tests__/scanner-consume.test.ts` asserting full/partial consume, FEFO override flow, qa gate, outbox events.
- Run `pnpm --filter web test scanner-consume`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not bypass qa_status gating.
- Do not skip FEFO deviation audit (V-WH-INT-004).
- Do not skip lp_genealogy (V-WH-INT-005).
- Do not block on FEFO deviation — warn + require reason, never hard block (Q6B).

## Dependencies
- T-030
- T-033
- T-025
- T-003
